case_for: Thielen has scored above the 12-point threshold in his last two games (23.9 and 19.2), showing strong recent target volume and involvement in the offense heading into week 15.
case_against: His season has shown volatility with multiple sub-10-point outings (7.9, 4.0, 8.7), meaning a quiet game script or reduced targets could easily drag him back below threshold.
